channel.title: Desktop Tooling Weekly
channel.description: Weekly feed for desktop tooling, configuration patterns, and release notes.

item.title: DTK expands structured sample coverage
item.author: team@example.com
item.description: DTK now ships more structured sample configs for filtering repeated payloads across command output and stored payloads, including formats that users encounter in real workflows.

item.title: Why repeated XML items are a good fit for DTK
item.author: team@example.com
item.description: XML feeds, manifests, and service catalogs often repeat the same nested shape with verbose metadata and long summaries that are easy to trim away.

item.title: Install-dummy sample design notes
item.author: team@example.com
item.description: Keep the recurring item fields and remove the editorial and tracking payload from the XML sample so the reduced output stays useful to the agent.

item.title: Practical XML usage in agent workflows
item.author: team@example.com
item.description: RSS-like XML is common enough in product dashboards and content pipelines that it makes a better sample than a toy nested element tree.
